entry.title: New: RES24-255 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
GRANTING A SPECIAL MANAGEMENT AREA MAJOR PERMIT TO ALLOW FOR THE CONSTRUCTION OF IMPROVEMENTS FOR THE WAIMĀNALO BEACH PARK IN WAIMĀNALO, OʻAHU.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution as amended were adopted. NOTE: Hand-carried FD1 OCS2024-1052/12/3/2024 1:58 PM withdrawn.

View on the council site
